criteria_results.description: Tools (Draw, Text, Icons) are visible in the top Toolbar component
criteria_results.evidence: client/src/components/editor/Toolbar.tsx line 35 includes <ToolSelector />. client/src/components/editor/Toolbar/ToolSelector.tsx contains Pencil (Draw), Type (Text), and various Icons.

criteria_results.description: Export actions are grouped under a DropdownMenu
criteria_results.evidence: client/src/components/editor/Toolbar/ProjectActions.tsx lines 98-143 define a DropdownMenu for 'Export' containing 'Merge and Export as PDF' (handleFlattenAndDownload) and 'Export Project Files (.zip)' (handleExportProject).

criteria_results.description: ObjectToolbar is completely removed from the project
criteria_results.evidence: Verified that client/src/components/editor/ObjectToolbar.tsx does not exist. grep search for 'ObjectToolbar' in client/src/ returned 0 matches, confirming it is not imported or used.
Executed 'npm run check' (tsc) which completed successfully with 0 errors.

next_focus: The implementation is complete and verified. No further actions needed for this task.

commit_message.subject: Refactor editor toolbar and consolidate project actions
commit_message.body:
Consolidated project actions (Save, Share, Open, Export) into organized
dropdown menus in the top toolbar. Migrated drawing and object tools
from the sidebar to a new ToolSelector in the main Toolbar component.
Removed the redundant ObjectToolbar component and updated home page
layout.
